name: Kelly Park
description: Kelly Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morrison, IL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Prophetstown Park District Rec Center
description: Prophetstown Park District Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Prophetstown, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Richmond Park
description: Come play pickleball at Richmond Park in Lyndon, IL! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Thomas Park
description: Come play pickleball at Thomas Park in Sterling, IL! There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Waterworks Park
description: Waterworks Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morrison, IL. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Westwood Fitness And Sports Center
